label: Nhu r2 nhung them MTP speculative decoding + uu tien chunked-prefill cho request ngan
graded_at_note: Chua chay/cham diem - day la de xuat, chua co ket qua BTC
diff_from_previous_run: +speculative-config={method: mtp, num_speculative_tokens: 3} (dung MTP head co san cua Qwen3.5 de giam TBT truc tiep - r2 cho thay TBT dang la ngan sach chat, 78%, con TTFT con du)
+max-num-partial-prefills=2, +max-long-partial-prefills=1, +long-prefill-token-threshold=8192 tren image da patch vLLM v0.24.0
Logic scheduler uu tien short prefill trong wave va chi cho 1 long prefill >8192 token chay dong thoi
open_questions_before_grading: Checkpoint model /model co thuc su chua trong so MTP head khong? Neu server tu choi load speculative-config, bo flag nay va chi giu 2 flag chunked-prefill.
num_speculative_tokens=3 la diem khoi dau thu nghiem, chua do ty le accept - can xem log/metrics acceptance rate sau khi chay de quyet dinh tang/giam (1-3 la khoang hop ly).
Neu TTFT p95 khong cai thien voi wave trung binh 4k-8k, thu giam long-prefill-token-threshold ve 4096 de uu tien fairness hon throughput.
